query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as total_amount_sum,
  SUM(CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as bad_debt_col_sum,
  SUM(CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as principal_sum,
  SUM(CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as interest_sum,
  SUM(CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as fee_sum,
  SUM(CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as penalty_sum,
  SUM(CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as unlock_fee_sum,
  SUM(CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as overpaid_sum,
  SUM(CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as discount_sum
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365';
